overview: WarriorMED provides testosterone replacement therapy and functional medicine for men with low testosterone, using a personalized approach that addresses hormone levels, diet, and lifestyle. Led by a naturopathic doctor with nearly 10 years of experience treating over 4,000 patients.
highlights: Virtual initial consultations with blood work through Labcorp or Quest
Functional medicine approach addressing root causes, not just symptoms
Home injection training; testosterone shipped to doorstep
targetAudience: Men experiencing low testosterone symptoms seeking a personalized, holistic approach to hormone replacement.
